landingCopy.hero: Fix Your Most Annoying Browser Habit in One Click
landingCopy.subhead: A lightweight Chrome extension that kills the tiny daily friction power users hate on LinkedIn, Gmail, and YouTube. Free to start, $7/mo to go Pro.
bullets: Installs in 10 seconds, works the moment you open your favorite tab
Zero data leaves your browser, your accounts stay private

faq.a: Yes. The extension runs locally in your browser and never sends your account data to our servers.

faq.q: What do I get with Pro?
faq.a: Pro unlocks bulk actions, advanced filters, and saved presets that save power users hours every week, for $7/mo.
Absolutely. Cancel in one click and you keep all free features forever, no questions asked.
Today we focus on LinkedIn, Gmail, and YouTube, with more high-traffic sites on the roadmap.

socialPosts.text: You open the same tab 50 times a day. That tiny friction you keep ignoring? We built a Chrome extension that removes it in one click. Free to start.

Power users don't switch tools, they sharpen the one they live in. Our new Chrome extension shaves minutes off the repetitive actions you do every day inside LinkedIn, Gmail, and YouTube. Free tier available now.
Spending all day in Gmail? Stop doing the same 4 clicks over and over. One install, instant relief. Free.
We obsessed over a problem most people just accept: the micro-annoyance you hit 30 times a day. Solved it. Try it free.
Most SaaS tries to do everything. We do one thing inside the website you already love, and we do it better than anyone. Lightweight, private, freemium. Pro is just $7/mo.
Runs 100% in your browser. No accounts synced to a server. Your data stays yours. That's how a Chrome extension should work.
Pro users save ~2 hours a week with bulk actions and saved presets. For $7/mo, that math is not close.
We asked 200 heavy LinkedIn users what slows them down. The answer wasn't features, it was friction. So we built an extension that removes it. Free to try, Pro at $7/mo.
10 second install. Zero learning curve. Works the second you open your favorite tab. Add it free.
If you live inside one website all day, this extension was built for you. Free forever for the core, $7/mo to go Pro. Try it.

emailSequence.subject: Your browser just got faster
emailSequence.body: Thanks for installing. You're 10 seconds away from killing the daily friction you've been ignoring. Open LinkedIn, Gmail, or YouTube and you'll see it working immediately. Reply if anything feels off, a real human reads these.

emailSequence.subject: The one feature most people miss
emailSequence.body: Quick tip: the saved presets feature lets you repeat your most common action with a single keystroke. Free users get one preset, Pro users get unlimited. Here's a 20-second demo to try it today.

emailSequence.subject: How much time are you actually saving?
emailSequence.body: We crunched the numbers. Pro users on average save about 2 hours per week through bulk actions and filters. That's roughly 100 hours a year reclaimed from repetitive clicking. Want to see your potential savings?

emailSequence.subject: A quick question for you
emailSequence.body: You've been using the free version for a few days now. What's the single most annoying thing left in your workflow? Hit reply and tell us, we ship updates based directly on these answers.

emailSequence.subject: Unlock Pro for the price of a coffee
emailSequence.body: For $7/mo you get bulk actions, advanced filters, and unlimited presets, no commitment, cancel anytime. If it doesn't save you more than it costs in the first week, just cancel. Upgrade here.
